risks.failure_mode: Choosing any-catch, majority, or unanimity after seeing outputs.
risks.mitigation: Freeze primary and report all rules before calls.

risks.failure_mode: Panel members share blind spots through training data or benchmark exposure.
risks.mitigation: Use cross-provider slots and report per-model metrics, not just panel aggregate.

risks.failure_mode: Valid JSON hides low semantic recall.
risks.mitigation: Treat schema as eligibility only; recall/specificity bars still decide.

risks.failure_mode: Recall rises by false-flagging legitimate controls.
risks.mitigation: Fail any rule below 0.90 specificity or above 4/40 control false positives.

risks.failure_mode: Invalid/refusal/inconclusive rows make a poor panel look cleaner.
risks.mitigation: Nondecisions are reported separately and excluded from TP/TN counts.

risks.failure_mode: Panel is treated as a replacement for held-out execution.
risks.mitigation: Keep execution-backed gates as the final layer for high-value uncertain rows.
